_meta.description: M10b B4 ponēros EVIDENCE (63). the evil one (Satan); evil-heart/treasure/conscience interior (+defile Mar7:23, +suneidesis Heb10:22); good/evil antithesis; evil generation/deeds/eye. Evidence only.
